data.title: Rob Shuter resigns from KPN’s Supervisory Board
data.description: In a recent announcement, telecommunications company KPN revealed that Mr. Rob Shuter has stepped down from his position on the Supervisory Board due to his additional obligations. This decision comes after Mr. Shuter's tenure with the company and will impact the oversight of KPN's operations moving forward.

data.title: Western Union plans to launch stablecoin USDPT in May.CEO Devin McGranahan aims to integrate digital assets into money movement services.
data.description: The CEO of Western Union, Devin McGranahan, announced plans to prioritize the expansion of adoption and integration of digital assets into the company's primary money movement platform in the future.

data.title: OSE Immunotherapeutics Welcomes FDA Orphan Drug Designation Granted to Pegrizeprument (VEL-101) for Prevention of Organ Rejection in Heart Transplant Patients
data.description: OSE Immunotherapeutics has received FDA Orphan Drug Designation for their medication Pegrizeprument (VEL-101) to prevent organ rejection following heart transplants. This designation is granted to drugs intended for the treatment of rare diseases affecting fewer than 200,000 people in the U.S. The drug aims to address the acute need for solutions to organ rejection, offering new hope to patients facing this challenge. This designation provides incentives for the development of drugs for rare conditions and highlights the potential impact of Pegrizeprument in the field of heart transplantation.
